title: Localization Issues
description: Phase 6 QA issues artifact. `category` is the stable persisted contract enum for downstream consumers; detailed Phase 6 QA classes belong in evidence metadata (for example `evidence.review_class`). Evidence must include at least url + bbox + screenshot storage reference.

category.description: Stable persisted contract category. Keep backward-compatible for issues.json consumers; do not replace with detailed Phase 6 review classes.
